evidence_rows.raw_activity: Freight transport services by road

evidence_rows.raw_row: Activity CCM 8.2 "Data-driven solutions for GHG emissions reductions": According to Annex I of the Climate Delegated Act, this economic activity includes the development or use of ICT solutions that are aimed at collecting, transmitting and storing data, and at its modelling and use where those activities are predominantly aimed at the provision of data and analytics enabling GHG emission reductions.

evidence_rows.raw_row: 1. The undertaking carries out, funds or has exposures to research, development, demonstration and deployment of innovative electricity generation facilities that produce energy from nuclear processes with minimal waste from the fuel cycle.
evidence_rows.raw_activity: research, development, demonstration and deployment of innovative electricity generation facilities (nuclear)

evidence_rows.raw_row: 2. The undertaking carries out, funds or has exposures to construction and safe operation of new nuclear installations to produce electricity or process heat, including for the purposes of district heating or industrial processes such as hydrogen production, as well as their safety upgrades, using best available technologies.
evidence_rows.raw_activity: construction and safe operation of new nuclear installations

evidence_rows.raw_row: 3. The undertaking carries out, funds or has exposures to safe operation of existing nuclear installations that produce electricity or process heat, including for the purposes of district heating or industrial processes such as hydrogen production from nuclear energy, as well as their safety upgrades.
evidence_rows.raw_activity: safe operation of existing nuclear installations

evidence_rows.raw_row: 4. The undertaking carries out, funds or has exposures to construction or operation of electricity generation facilities that produce electricity using fossil gaseous fuels.
evidence_rows.raw_activity: construction or operation of electricity generation facilities using fossil gaseous fuels

evidence_rows.raw_row: 5. The undertaking carries out, funds or has exposures to construction, refurbishment, and operation of combined heat/cool and power generation facilities using fossil gaseous fuels.
evidence_rows.raw_activity: construction, refurbishment, and operation of combined heat/cool and power generation facilities using fossil gaseous fuels

evidence_rows.raw_row: 6. The undertaking carries out, funds or has exposures to construction, refurbishment and operation of heat generation facilities that produce heat/cool using fossil gaseous fuels.
evidence_rows.raw_activity: construction, refurbishment and operation of heat generation facilities using fossil gaseous fuels
